mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_profile (user_id, major, grade, base_cities, target_position, gpa, political_status, honors, projects, campus, skills, languages, self_evaluation, internships, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{major}, #{grade}, #{baseCities}, #{targetPosition}, #{gpa}, #{politicalStatus}, #{honors}, #{projects}, #{campus}, #{skills}, #{languages}, #{selfEvaluation}, #{internships}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_profile SET major = #{major}, grade = #{grade}, base_cities = #{baseCities}, target_position = #{targetPosition}, gpa = #{gpa}, political_status = #{politicalStatus}, honors = #{honors}, projects = #{projects}, campus = #{campus}, skills = #{skills}, languages = #{languages}, self_evaluation = #{selfEvaluation}, internships = #{internships}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
